Content.description:
Rule file content in YAML format. Content length limits:
- Each `expr` must not exceed 16 KB.
- Each `record` must not exceed 2,048 bytes.
- Each `labelname` must not exceed 256 bytes.
- Each `labelvalue` must not exceed 2,048 bytes.

CreateTime.description: Rule file creation time in RFC3339 format.

Description.description:
Rule file description, limited to 0–200 characters.

:::tip Note
Each English letter, Chinese character, or symbol counts as one character.
:::

LastUpdateTime.description: Last updated time of the rule file in RFC3339 format.

Name.description:
Rule file name:

- Must be a valid Linux file name and less than 255 characters.
- Must be unique within the workspace.

RuleCount.description: Number of rules in the rule file.

Status.description:
Rule file status:

- **Creating**: Creating
- **Running**: Running
- **Updating**: Updating
- **OverdueSuspended**: Suspended due to overdue payment
- **Resuming**: Resuming

TargetWorkspaceId.description: Target workspace ID to write to. If empty, writes to the source workspace.
